title: Contact - Hospeda
description: Get in touch with us. We're here to help you with any questions about accommodations and travel.
heading: Contact us
subheading: We're here to help. Reach out to us with any questions
subtitle: Have a question or suggestion? Fill out the form and we'll get back to you shortly.

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters

validation.messageMinLength: Message must be at least 20 characters

form.successMsg: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly.

address.label: Address

channels.title: Let's talk however you prefer
channels.subtitle: Pick the channel that works best for you. We'll reply as soon as possible.

phone.title: Phone
phone.description: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM (UTC-3).

social.title: Social media
social.description: Follow us for news and promos.

faq.title: Before reaching out
faq.subtitle: Maybe your question already has an answer.

responseTime.question: How long until I get a reply?
responseTime.answer: We reply within 24 business hours. Weekends may take a bit longer.

accommodationIssue.question: I have an issue with a booking
accommodationIssue.answer: Pick "Accommodation inquiry" in the form and add the accommodation ID. This helps us assist you faster.

ownerInquiry.question: I want to list my property on Hospeda
ownerInquiry.answer: Visit our owners page for plans and onboarding. If you need help, write to us.

languages.question: What languages do you speak?
languages.answer: We speak Spanish, English, and Portuguese. Write to us in the language you prefer.

trust.humans: A real person, not a bot

error: Something went wrong while sending your message.

page.title: Contact
page.description: Contact Hospeda. We are here to help you with your accommodation inquiries in Concepción del Uruguay
